pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-S-007 (Security & Privacy/Skill) excluded: edge_case: 1 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.423. Highest framework: EU AI Act at 0.423.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
